item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 clearly wakes up to the repeated local-repair spiral, refuses the requested page-level patch, names the recurrence mechanism, and redirects to a single upstream authority. Turn 2 keeps the brake active under time pressure and does not provide the requested chart-field copy, placement, checklist, command sequence, or implementation step. Because it does not make an emergency concession, the one-time/no-baseline-lift/deadline contract is not triggered; no fail signal is observed."}
